title: Chinese Buddhist: Larger Sukhavativyuha (Pure Land) (3)
description: From the Chinese Buddhist canon: Larger Sukhavativyuha (Pure Land)
introduction: From the Chinese Buddhist canon: Larger Sukhavativyuha (Pure Land)

translation.text: From Larger Sukhavativyuha (Pure Land): A core text of Chinese Buddhism, transmitted through the great translation period and forming the basis of East Asian Buddhist practice.
